conversation.text: How much is a UK local number?
I'd be happy to help with that! To make sure I connect you with the right resources — are you an existing CINNOX customer, or are you new to us?

Thanks, Jason! Let me confirm your details:

- **Name:** Jason
- **Company:** PC Bank
- **Email:** jason@pcb.com
- **Phone:** +85211771177

Is that correct?

Thank you, Jason! Your information has been saved.

Now, regarding your question about UK local number pricing — let me look that up for you.According to our published rate sheet, a **UK local number (DID)** has a monthly fee of **US$19/month**.

Here are the associated usage rates:

| Rate Type | Price (US$) |
|---|---|
| Monthly fee (MRC) | $19 |
| Receive call – from mobile | $0.50/min |
| Receive call – from fixed/landline | $0.02/min |
| Make call – to mobile | $5.60/min |
| Make call – to fixed/landline | $0.74/min |

Is there anything else you'd like to know, Jason?

A **Germany local number (DID)** is also **US$19/month**. Here are the usage rates:

| Rate Type | Price (US$) |
|---|---|
| Monthly fee (MRC) | $19 |
| Receive call – from mobile | $0.02/min |
| Receive call – from fixed/landline | $0.02/min |
| Make call – to mobile | $0.57/min |
| Make call – to fixed/landline | $1.483/min |

Notably, Germany's inbound call rates are lower than the UK's. Would you like to compare any other countries, Jason?

A **Hong Kong local number (DID)** is **US$25/month** — slightly higher than the UK and Germany. Here are the usage rates:

| Rate Type | Price (US$) |
|---|---|
| Monthly fee (MRC) | $25 |
| Receive call – from mobile | $0.02/min |
| Receive call – from fixed/landline | $0.02/min |
| Make call – to mobile | $0.07/min |
| Make call – to fixed/landline | $0.05/min |

Hong Kong has very competitive outbound call rates compared to the other two regions. Would you like to see any other countries, Jason?
Alright! If you have any other questions about CINNOX, feel free to ask anytime. I'm here to help, Jason! 😊
